name: ls-idv-customer
description: Life sciences customer IDV (demo/open mode). Requires accountNumber, phone, statedLastProduct, statedLastQuantity, and statedLastUnit in one call. Any values are accepted and return VERIFIED.

accountNumber.description: Required. Any account number accepted in demo mode. Aliases: uniqueNumber, customerNumber.

phone.description: Required. Any phone (+61 4… or 04…). Aliases: phoneNumber, mobile, ani.

statedLastProduct.description: Required. What the caller says they last ordered. Any product name accepted. Aliases: lastOrderProduct, statedProductName.

statedLastQuantity.description: Required. Last order quantity. Aliases: lastOrderQuantity, statedQuantity.

statedLastUnit.description: Required. case/cases or bag/bags. Aliases: lastOrderUnit, statedUnit.

uniqueIdentifier.description: Optional. Assigned automatically if omitted. Aliases: uniqueId, uid.

organizationName.description: Optional facility name. Aliases: customerName, facilityName.
